message:
deps: bump frankensearch-core, frankensearch-embed, frankensearch-index to 0.1.1

Cargo.lock updated to reflect the 0.1.0 → 0.1.1 version bump across all
three frankensearch workspace crates. No dependency additions or removals;
this is a coordinated patch release of the frankensearch components that
accompanies the analytics and UI changes in the preceding commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1642,7 +1642,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch-core"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "serde",
@@ -1656,7 +1656,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch-embed"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "dirs",
@@ -1685,7 +1685,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch-index"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "crc32fast",
  "frankensearch-core",
